article_title: FDA Awards National Priority Vouchers to Three Psychedelic Programs, Compressing Review Times to One to Two Months

findings.message: Source redirected to different domain: edition.cnn.com

content_preview.title: FDA Awards National Priority Vouchers to Three Psychedelic Programs, Compressing Review Times to One to Two Months
content_preview.summary: Compass Pathways, Usona Institute, and Otsuka-acquired Transcend Therapeutics have been selected for FDA's Commissioner's National Priority Voucher program for psilocybin and methylone, six days after President Trump's executive order on serious mental illness.
content_preview.body_excerpt:
## Overview

The U.S. Food and Drug Administration on April 24, 2026 awarded Commissioner's National Priority Vouchers to three psychedelic drug programs, [according to CNN](https://www.cnn.com/2026/04/24/health/fda-psychedelic-drugs-priority-vouchers): Compass Pathways' synthetic psilocybin formulation for treatment-resistant depression, Usona Institute's psilocybin candidate for major depressive disorder, and Transcend Therapeutics' methylone-based program for post-traumatic stress disorder. T...

editor_notes.content_quality: Strong Policy & Regulation / Biotech & Medicine News piece. All 5 prior findings cleanly addressed.
editor_notes.source_verification: Re-verified. New BioPharma Dive source-6 confirms verbatim 'COMP360, a synthetic form of psilocybin that could become the first classic psychedelic cleared for the U.S.' New PRNewswire source-7 confirms 'Otsuka Pharmaceutical to Acquire Transcend Therapeutics'. WH source-2 confirms verbatim 'The suicide rate among veterans is more than twice as high as that of the non-veteran adult population' — bot was right to dispute the prior finding. Ibogaine 'compounds' verbatim verified. Sources expanded from 7 to 8.
editor_notes.factual_accuracy: All 5 prior findings resolved. Bot's disagreement on the 'twice as high' multiplier was correct — WH source-2 does carry it verbatim.
editor_notes.overall_assessment: Clean APPROVE on re-review. Ready to merge.
